message:
feat: implement wa triage command (TTY + JSON)

Adds `wa triage` that aggregates health diagnostics, crash bundles,
unhandled events, and incomplete workflows into a prioritized view.
Operators can immediately see what needs attention and get actionable
next-step commands.

- Triage variant in Commands enum with --format, --severity, --only, --verbose
- TTY output: grouped by section, sorted by severity, suggested commands
- JSON output: stable schema with ok/version/total/items fields
- Graceful degradation when DB is unavailable
- Severity filtering and section filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
